title: BIPCircle role taxonomy
description: Schema for products/bipcircle/config/roles.json. Validated at boot by the loader in roles.js. Role values are lowercase snake_case identifiers; legacy alias keys must not collide with canonical role values (enforced by the loader's consistency check).

roles.description: Map from UPPER_SNAKE_CASE role key to lowercase snake_case role value. Every value is exported as a named constant by roles.js.

legacyAliases.description: Map from legacy role name to canonical role value. Used by resolveRole() to normalise older JWT claims.
